commit.message:
Close sorry (12) Gauss's law, decompose sorry (7) UniformSchwartzDecay (3→2)

- Proved hGauss: divergence of E=0 simplifies to 0, simp closes ∫eM=ρ_ion
- Decomposed hSchwartz: proved hGradDecay (spatial constant → gradient 0),
  left hDecay sorry (needs iteratedFDeriv polynomial×Gaussian bound)
- Updated MEMORY.md, docstrings, critique, plan, log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add sys_kill, sys_task_info syscalls, ps command, and kill builtin

Kernel:
- SYS_TASK_KILL (104): terminate a task by TID (requires CAP_TASK_MGMT or same UID)
- SYS_TASK_INFO (105): query task state, UID, and parent TID for enumeration

User-space:
- New ps command: lists all running tasks with TID, state, UID, PPID
- Shell kill builtin: `kill <tid>` to terminate tasks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update author name to Carolyn Martin, standardize email to cmartin8@pride.hofstra.edu, fix Gill & Lennon framework from 6 to 5 categories

v0.5.2: AI-generated instance summary in MCP instructions

Adds LLM integration (OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI) to generate a
contextual summary of the BookStack instance at startup. The summary
describes what the knowledge base is about and who uses it, and is
included in MCP instructions so connecting AI assistants have immediate
context. Cached in DB metadata to survive restarts.

New env vars: BSMCP_LLM_PROVIDER, BSMCP_LLM_API_KEY, BSMCP_LLM_MODEL,
BSMCP_SUMMARY_TOKEN_ID/SECRET (falls back to BSMCP_EMBED_TOKEN_*).

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

commit.message:
feat: Add multi-user support with login program

Kernel changes:
- Add uid/gid fields to Task struct, inherited by child tasks
- Add CAP_SET_UID capability for privileged identity changes
- Add syscalls: SYS_GET_UID (100), SYS_SET_UID (101), SYS_SET_GID (102), SYS_GET_TUID (103)

User-space changes:
- Add passwd parser library to libquark (no-alloc, fixed-size buffers)
- Add /etc/passwd file with root as default user
- Add login program: prompts for username, looks up passwd, sets UID/GID, spawns shell
- Init now prefers LOGIN.ELF over SHELL.ELF (with fallback)
- Shell reads home directory from argv[1] (passed by login), cd with no args goes home

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

params: extend L1/L3 ranges, lower Ibias min for even better efficiency

L1 max → 20µm, L3 max → 50µm (longer channels → lower λ → more gain).
Ibias min → 5µA (from 10µA) to allow lower quiescent currents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

results: 1.00 — run 7 BEST cost 292.18, 181dB gain, 33.9MHz GBW, 217mW

Extended L3 max to 20µm and W9/W10 max to 1000µm. DE exploited both:
L3=17.9µm (longer channel → lower λ → higher gain), W10=582µm
(wider output → better drive). Power at record low 217mW.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: percentage formatting, funding layout, table column defaults

- KBCellValue: format fraction fields (stake, pledge, stake_acquired) as
  percentages (0.8 → 80%, [0.015, 0.025] → 1.5%–2.5%)
- KBCellValue: handle number array ranges ([low, high] → formatted range)
- FundingRoundRow: two-line layout (financials on line 1, lead/source on
  line 2), removed timeline dots
- Skip empty endpoint columns (e.g. partner in strategic-partnerships)
- Add DEFAULT_RECORD_COLUMNS for board-seats, charitable-pledges,
  equity-positions, investments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Safari: kill all shadowBlur globally via prototype override

Instead of chasing individual shadowBlur lines with *SB multipliers,
override the setter on CanvasRenderingContext2D so blur is always 0
on Safari. Fixes remaining blur on mission hints and all other text.

the KB writer's usage. Catches regressions like adding a new tag to
the loader without handling it in the writer, or changing tag behavior.

docs(research): 技術棧全面研究 — 10 面向並行收集 + master-index + entities

01 iPhone 備份協定（AFC、libimobiledevice、MTP）
02 mDNS/Bonjour 深度研究（bonjour-service、DNS-SD 原理）
03 LAN 檔案傳輸技術（HTTP chunked、斷點續傳、xxHash64）
04 類似工具分析（iMazing、pymobiledevice3、開源方案）
05 iOS 安全沙箱限制（PTP、AFC、USB Restricted Mode）
06 Electron IPC 架構（MessagePort、Worker Thread、大檔案傳輸）
07 macOS 系統整合（Sequoia 權限、SMAppService、launchd）
08 electron-builder 打包（無簽名 DMG、auto-update 限制）
09 背景服務與排程（node-usb hotplug、launchd、powerSaveBlocker）
10 測試策略（vitest mock、Playwright E2E、memfs）
+ master-index（跨面向洞察、技術選型建議）
+ entities（協定關係圖、工具聚合索引）

params: extend output W to 1000µm, mirror L3 to 20µm for better drive/gain

Widen W9/W10 max to 1000µm for improved output drive capability.
Extend L3 max to 20µm to allow longer mirror channel → lower λ → higher gain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

results: 1.00 — two-stage class-AB run 6, 175dB gain, 20.5MHz GBW, 253mW

Tuned parameter ranges (lower Cc min=0.1pF, Ibias max=3mA) yielded
good power efficiency at 253mW while maintaining all 6/6 specs.
Cost 292.46, 823 iterations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close 3 non-vacuousness sorry's (6→3): exp decay, gradient bound, Ampere

- (8) hExpDecay: proved via equilibriumMaxwellian_exp_lower_bound helper
  (normSq v ≤ 3(1+‖v‖)², C = 3/(2T) + max(0,-log prefix))
- (9) hGradBound: proved via fderiv_equilibriumMaxwellian (simp; ring)
  then |vᵢ|/T ≤ (1+‖v‖)/T using norm_le_pi_norm
- (11) hAmpere: curl of B=0 simplifies to 0, fin_cases i <;> simp

3 sorry's remain: (7) Schwartz, (10) Vlasov nullspace, (12) Gauss integral

commit.message:
feat: PG-native resources R1+R2 — stable_id column and build pipeline PG fetch

Phase R1: Add `stable_id` (10-char alphanumeric) column to PG resources table.
- Migration 0071 adds nullable unique column with index
- Drizzle schema updated, API types include stableId in upsert/response
- sync-resources generates stableId for each resource; COALESCE preserves existing
- Backfill script for existing rows (post-deploy manual step)
- Bulk citations endpoint GET /api/resources/citations/all

Phase R2: Build pipeline reads resources from PG with fallback chain.
- build-data.mjs: PG → snapshot JSON → YAML (graceful degradation)
- New `crux wiki-server snapshot-resources` command exports PG to JSON
- Resources transformed to YAML-compatible snake_case shape for zero frontend changes

Closes #2037

fix(docstore): CRITICAL 보안 취약점 3건 패치

context:
* AUTH_TOKEN_SECRET 빈 문자열 허용 → 32자 최소 길이 강제, 미달 시 토큰 서명/검증 거부
* DB SSL rejectUnauthorized: false → DB_CA_CERT 환경변수로 CA 인증서 제공 시 엄격 검증 활성화
* Rate Limiter 인메모리 Map → PostgreSQL DB 기반으로 전환 (Vercel 콜드 스타트에도 유지)
* DB 장애 시 인메모리 자동 폴백으로 서비스 중단 방지
* 8개 API 파일의 checkRateLimit 호출에 await 추가 (비동기 전환)

verify:
* AUTH 시크릿 32자 미만 시 signToken 예외 발생 + verifyToken null 반환 확인
* AUTH 32자 이상 시 정상 토큰 발급/검증 확인
* DB rate_limits 테이블 자동 생성 + 카운터 저장 확인
* 로그인 5회 초과 시 429 응답 + Retry-After 헤더 확인
* 프로덕션 배포 후 로그인 + Rate Limit 헤더 정상 표시 확인

AI was incorrectly assuming edit_page/replace_section don't work on
WYSIWYG pages because get_page shows empty markdown field. In reality,
all editing tools use BookStack's markdown export API which converts
HTML to markdown automatically. Updated tool descriptions and server
instructions to make this explicit and encourage targeted edits over
full-page update_page rewrites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix auto-migration crash when SQLite has no semantic tables

The SQLite DB from pre-semantic installs only has access_tokens — no
pages/chunks/relationships/embed_jobs tables. Migration now checks
for each table before querying it, so it gracefully migrates only
what exists and renames the file to prevent retry on next restart.

via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

commit.message:
fix: Revert IRQ-based disk waits to fix deadlock after boot

The IRQ-based wait had a race condition: between checking the IRQ ring
(empty) and blocking in sys_recv, the IRQ could fire and unblock_task
would no-op since the task was still Running, causing a permanent deadlock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: KB PG tables — store entity IDs, NUMERIC amount, pagination, grantee

Follow-up to PR #2042 addressing review comments:

- Store canonical 10-char entity IDs in PG instead of slugs, eliminating
  the slug→entityId remapping layer in build-data.mjs
- Change grants.amount from DOUBLE PRECISION to NUMERIC for precise
  financial data
- Add nullable grantee_id column on grants for forward compatibility
- Replace hardcoded limit=200 with paginated fetching in build-data.mjs
- Add batch chunking (500/request) in kb-migrate-records sync
- Document career-history free-text org references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: address review findings — fact IDs, shared tags, slug collisions

- Fix fact ID format: use plain generateId() (10-char) instead of
  f_ + generateFactId() which produced double-prefix after #2035 merge
- Import CUSTOM_TAGS from loader.ts instead of duplicating tag
  definitions in kb-writer.ts — prevents drift between reader and writer
- Detect slug collisions when both things/<slug>.yaml and things/<slug>/
  directory exist — throws instead of silently loading both
- Sort files alphabetically in per-entity directories for deterministic
  fact ordering across platforms
- Validate _sources values are strings (warn and skip non-string values)

Addresses PR review comments from #2043.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix notification_list showing count but no details (beads-txt1)

Cache notification metadata (title, message, type) when created/updated,
and return it in the list handler. Chrome's getAll() only returns IDs,
so we maintain an in-memory cache that gets pruned on each list call.

fix(main): CR auto-fix — 視窗引用快照、isDestroyed 防護與 activate fallback

- window-manager: getMainWindow() 加入 isDestroyed() 自清邏輯，
  防止回傳已銷毀的 BrowserWindow 物件
- index.ts: createWindow() 新增 win.on('closed') → setMainWindow(null)，
  確保視窗銷毀後全域引用被清除
- index.ts: activate handler 改為 isDestroyed() 判斷，
  null/destroyed 時 fallback createWindow()，避免靜默失敗
- notification-service: 改以 getter 函式取代快照傳入，
  點擊 notification 時呼叫 resolveWin() 取得最新視窗引用，
  並加入 isDestroyed() 防護

commit.message:
Rate-limit captureVisibleTab in full-page screenshot loop (beads-kgoc)

Add 350ms delay after each captureVisibleTab() call to stay under
Chrome's MAX_CAPTURE_VISIBLE_TAB_CALLS_PER_SECOND=2 quota. Combined
with the existing 150ms scroll delay, total is ~500ms per capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Replace yield-polling with IRQ-based waits in disk driver

Replace sys_yield() polling loops in ata_wait_not_busy and ata_wait_drq
with IRQ-based blocking via sys_recv(0). The driver now sleeps until
IRQ 14 fires instead of spinning through the scheduler, waking up
exactly when the disk operation completes rather than on the next
scheduler quantum (~10ms at 100Hz).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Add multi-sector disk reads to reduce IPC round-trips

Add TAG_READ_SECTORS support to disk driver (reads up to 8 consecutive
sectors per IPC call) and cluster prefetching to VFS. Directory scans
(find_entry, read_dir_entry, create_dir_entry, update_dir_entry_size)
and file reads (read_file_data) now prefetch all sectors in a cluster
with a single IPC call, reducing round-trips ~8x for sequential access.

commit.message:
perf: Add text cell buffer to console for scroll optimization

Replace direct framebuffer manipulation with an in-memory text cell
buffer (char + color per cell). Characters are written to the cell
buffer during putc, and the framebuffer is only updated during flush
at the end of each write_bytes batch. Scroll now shifts the cell
buffer in cached RAM instead of reading from uncached/WC framebuffer
memory, eliminating the expensive ~3MB volatile reads that were the
main scroll bottleneck.

commit.message:
Close 4 non-vacuousness sorry's (10→6), fix rpow_pos API rename

- Proved goals (4)(5)(6)(13) in CoulombConcreteTheorem42_nonvacuous:
  Maxwellian C^∞, periodicLift of constant C^∞, divB=0
- Fixed Real.rpow_pos → Real.rpow_pos_of_pos in Defs.lean
- Decomposed all_goals sorry into 10 labeled individual goals
- Added spatial smoothness design doc (parametric IsSpatiallySmooth n)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: trigger Vercel build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: KB Phase 2 — authoring tooling, source aliases, per-entity dirs

Implements the three main features from #2030:

1. CLI authoring commands: `crux kb add-fact` and `crux kb add-record`
   for appending structured data to entity YAML files with comment-
   preserving round-trip editing via the YAML Document API.

2. File-level source aliases: `_sources` map + `!src` custom YAML tag
   to reduce URL duplication in entity files. Aliases are resolved at
   load time and stripped from the entity object.

3. Per-entity directories: entities can be split across multiple YAML
   files in a `things/<slug>/` directory. Files are merged at load time
   (facts concatenated, records deep-merged, _sources merged).

Also adds kb-writer.ts (YAML read-modify-write utilities), comprehensive
tests for all three features (source-aliases, per-entity-dirs, CLI
commands), and fixes a latent stringify double-tag bug in all three
custom YAML tags (!ref, !date, !src).

Closes #2030

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Phase 2 executor placing zero trades due to missing pending_addition

calculateFinalPortfolio in net-trade-calculator.mjs queried investment_amount
from DB but never read pending_addition. For new bots (investment_amount = 0,
all capital in pending_addition), this produced totalInvestmentDollars = 0 →
empty finalPortfolio → calculateNetTrades returns 0 → "No trades needed".

Fix 1 (net-trade-calculator.mjs): Add pending_addition to the SQL SELECT and
apply it to dollarAmount before weighting — same logic as phase2-execution.mjs
already uses when computing targetAmount for the portfolio display.

Fix 2 (phase2-execution.mjs): When clearing pending_addition after execution,
also absorb it into investment_amount (SET investment_amount = investment_amount
+ pending_addition, pending_addition = 0) so subsequent runs use the correct
base amount. Same pattern as the fix previously made to trading-scheduler.mjs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
